gate_type: Azure IaC (Bicep) skeleton + deployment docs + offline validation
ready_for_slava_manual_retest_reason: infra skeleton + docs only; nothing deployed; no product/runtime change
scope_summary: Author a Bicep IaC skeleton (subscription-scope main + 8 RG-scoped modules + params + README), 4 deployment docs, and a disabled workflow_dispatch-only CI workflow; validate offline with az bicep build. No az login, no resources, no deploy, no secrets, no source commit/push. All files left uncommitted for the commit gate.

source_repo.head: 2e9443a6726f34f20bd26233e840ae8cc982d91a
source_repo.working_tree_after: +17 new uncommitted files this gate + 4 uncommitted pre-flight docs (prior gate) + test-results/.last-run.json

iac_decision.approach: Bicep-first (subscription-scope main.bicep creates RG + wires RG-scoped modules)
iac_decision.why: Azure-native, no state backend, first-class type checking, azd-compatible, strongest Azure interview story
iac_decision.why_not_terraform: no multi-cloud requirement; avoids running a state backend + provider auth for a single-cloud demo
iac_decision.why_not_azd_only: azd uses Bicep underneath; a clean modular Bicep tree can be wrapped by azd later without rework

workflows: .github/workflows/azure-deploy-demo.yml (workflow_dispatch only; deploy guarded; az steps commented; OIDC placeholders; no secrets)

resource_model.static_web_app: SWA Free — public static; auth-gated protected routes
resource_model.container_apps: env + insurance-api, minReplicas=0 scale-to-zero, HTTP scale rule, user-assigned MI
resource_model.storage_cleanup: Storage allowSharedKeyAccess=false + 4 containers + lifecycle TTL (delete after blobTtlDays)
resource_model.key_vault_identity: Key Vault RBAC + user-assigned MI + role assignments (KV Secrets User, Blob Data Contributor)
resource_model.observability: Log Analytics retention 30d + dailyQuotaGb 1; App Insights SamplingPercentage 50
resource_model.ai_optional: OpenAI S0 + Document Intelligence F0 + AI Search Free — only if enableAi=true (default false); disableLocalAuth=true

validation.result: EXIT 0, 0 errors, 0 warnings, ARM template emitted (1291 lines)
validation.limitations: offline only — no az login / no what-if / no deployment; does not verify live Azure quota/region/SKU availability

safety.secrets_scan: PASS — no secret values; only public Azure built-in role IDs + all-zeros placeholder; no real subscription/tenant ids; no keys/passwords/connection strings
safety.passwordless_by_design: allowSharedKeyAccess=false (storage) + azureADOnlyAuthentication=true (SQL) + Key Vault RBAC + Managed Identity

limitations: bicep build is offline — does not verify live Azure quota / region SKU / model availability (surfaces at what-if/deploy)
deploy-time inputs deferred: insuranceApiImage (GHCR tag) + sqlAdminObjectId (Entra group oid) — supplied at deploy, never committed
Dockerfile + GHCR publish + OIDC federation are AZURE_MINIMAL_DEPLOY_V0.1 deliverables

next_safe_step.name: AZURE_IAC_SKELETON_COMMIT_V0.1
next_safe_step.action: commit infra/ + 8 docs/architecture/azure/* + disabled workflow to dev (commit gate runs QA-inspector path)
next_safe_step.then: AZURE_MINIMAL_DEPLOY_V0.1 (Dockerfile + GHCR + OIDC + first real deploy ~$0)
